Sports Scene

Copied

CMG President Shen Haixiong (L) and IOC President Thomas Bach jointly display a Paris 2024 No. 1 jersey. /CMG

President of the International Olympic Committee (IOC) Thomas Bach has expressed his gratitude to China Media Group (CMG) for its broadcast preparations for the upcoming Paris Summer Games.

He commended the significant support from the Chinese people and praised CMG's pivotal role, especially in the use of 8K Ultra HD technology and artificial intelligence, which he said had revolutionized the Olympic broadcasting.

President Bach also wished CMG great success in its coverage of the Games, and emphasized that the IOC will continue to deepen its comprehensive cooperation with CMG.

title: IOC's Bach praises CMG's preparations for Olympic coverage - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: President of the International Olympic Committee (IOC) Thomas Bach has expressed his gratitude to China Media Group (CMG) for its broadcast preparations for the upcoming Paris Summer Games.He commended the significant support from the Chinese people
